title: Unique columns between groups
excerpt: I would really love it if I had the ability to set each group up within a board with their own individual columns rather than the change made on one group propagating down to the other groups.  Sometimes you don’t want t…

posts.author: mmatisa (Michael Matisa)
posts.cookedHtml: I would really love it if I had the ability to set each group up within a board with their own individual columns rather than the change made on one group propagating down to the other groups. Sometimes you don’t want the same columns in each group. Please and thank you!

posts.author: shannon-cxmonday (Shannon Thao)
posts.cookedHtml: 7 posts were merged into an existing topic: Different columns in different groups within one board
